description: Shadow mode pairings: old hooks mapped to AISLE scanners for parallel execution. Used during migration to verify AISLE produces equivalent or stricter decisions.

pairings.notes: Scanner A subsumes blueprint quarantine via lockfile integrity checks
Scanner D protects more paths than pre-write-check
Scanner E covers PreToolUse only — UserPromptSubmit gap needs aisle-prompt-guard.cjs post-cutover
Scanner E adds DNS exfil detection (hex, base32, split-label) beyond simple pattern matching
All token-guard patterns are included in secret-patterns.json consumed by Scanner E
Scanner I adds instruction-override detection and rapid-write anomaly. memory-protocol-check only warns on missing memory_store before commit
